name: Mulled Cranberry Cider
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, combine cranberry juice, apple cider, ginger, and allspice.
2. Cover and bring the mixture to boil slowly.
3. Reduce heat to low and simmer for 45 minutes.
4. Strain the mixture through a fine mesh strainer into a bowl or pitcher.
5. Serve hot.
Makes 6 cups (1.5 L)
Preparation time: 5 minutes
Simmering time: 45 minutes
Per cup: 145 calories, 38g carbohydrate, excellent source of vitamin C.
